name: village-finder
description: Interactive village maps + search for Indian states, built from LGD open data.

scripts.docs: npm run docs:js && npm run docs:py
scripts.docs:py: python3 -m pdoc scraper/pipeline.py scraper/lgd_client.py scraper/build_boundaries.py scraper/enrich_coords.py scraper/enrich_native_names.py scraper/changelog.py scraper/release_notes.py -o docs/api/python
